[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020-12-16
[TITLE]: Golden Retriever Dog Loves His Duck Best Friend - Videos - The Dodo
[METADATA/INTRO]: Best Animal Friends S2 E10...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Golden Retriever Dog Loves His Duck Best Friend 
 Barclay is a duck-dog. That’s a dog who likes to hang out with ducks! But his absolute favorite is a duck named Rudy. Rudy is Barclay’s best friend. They play, and wrestle, and like to ride around on vacuums together! Before they met, Barclay was really shy. But Rudy’s helped Barclay feel confident, bold, and so happy! 
 Special thanks to Pam, Barclay & his duck friends. Keep up with them @ducksmakegreatpets. 
 Fluffy Sheep Is Obsessed With Becoming A Dog 
 From the moment Etienne the sheep arrived on the farm, she knew she didn’t belong with the other farm animals. She wanted to do everything the dogs were doing! At first, the dogs weren't sure what to make of her, but it didn't take long for Etienne to show the dogs that she could be part of the pack!

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: This Surprising Dog And Duck Friendship Shows That Animals Pick Friends Not By Their Looks | Bored Panda
[METADATA/INTRO]: This Surprising Dog And Duck Friendship Shows That Animals Pick Friends Not By Their Looks Meet Barclay, the Golden Retriever and his best friend, a four-year-old Pekin duck Rudy, who both have a thing or two to teach you about...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Meet Rudy, the Pekin duck, and his best friend Barclay, the Golden Retriever 
 Image credits: Pam Ishiguro, Bancroft Images 
 As great friendships go, this one had a rather bumpy start, when Barclay discovered just how tasty the stolen duck chow is 
 Image credits: Pam Ishiguro, Bancroft Images 
 Rudy, being the alpha duck of his group, would chase Barclay away 
 Image credits: Pam Ishiguro, Bancroft Images 
 But soon the Retriever became such a frequent visitor in the coop that it was just a matter of time before these guys clicked 
 Image credits: Pam Ishiguro, Bancroft Images 
 Now they have developed a healthy relationship, where everybody is getting something out of it
